channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: New missile video puts spotlight on US over Iran school attack
item.description: A newly released video suggests a US Tomahawk missile likely struck an Iranian elementary girls’ school in Minab.

item.title: Is the Iran war really costing the US $2bn per day?
item.description: The Pentagon has not yet released an official estimate of the cost of the US war on Iran.

item.title: Bangladesh closes universities due to Iran war energy crisis
item.description: Bangladesh closes universities due to Iran war energy crisis

item.title: As Khamenei son takes over, Nigerian Shias mourn Iran’s old supreme leader
item.description: In northern Nigeria, Shias see new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei as a 'continuation of his father’s resistance'.

item.title: Most victims of US-Israeli attacks are civilians, says Iran
item.description: Iran’s deputy health minister, Dr Ali Jafarian, says more than 1,255 people have been killed and that most are civilians

item.title: Iranians celebrate as Mojtaba Khamenei named new supreme leader
item.description: Supporters across Iran gathered to celebrate after Mojtaba Khamenei was named the country’s new supreme leader.

item.title: US-Israel war on Iran: A brief history of mission creep and false promises
item.description: Modern wars show how easily leaders meet rhetorical burden of justification and avoid strategic burden of ending them.

item.title: Bahrain king calls Iranian attacks unjustifiable
item.description: Bahrain’s King Hamad bin Isa Al Khalifa says “unprecedented attacks” by Iran against Bahrain “cannot be justified".

item.title: ‘Reprehensible’: New wave of Iranian missiles, drones target Gulf nations
item.description: Gulf states lambast Iran for its continued strikes on their territories, with Qatar urging all sides to de-escalate.

item.title: Moment building in Beirut southern suburbs was targeted by Israeli strike
item.description: This is the moment a building in Beirut’s southern suburbs was targeted by an Israeli attack.
